analysis.doc: Synchronized from Linear issue identifier: POL-426

POL-426.title: Implement: Fix autoresearch scoring evidence collection
POL-426.body:
## Objective

Fix three bugs in the autoresearch scoring pipeline that cause `polaris autoresearch score` to produce
inaccurate results for all runs — legacy and current. After this fix, the scoring pipeline correctly
locates WorkerResultContract evidence and evaluates gates without false positives.

## Context

[POL-425](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-425/analyze-legacy-worker-result-artifacts-prevent-autoresearch-evidence) (Analyze) identified that the `extractWorkerResultContracts` function in `score.ts` reads from
cluster result files (`.polaris/clusters/<id>/results/*.json`). Those files only contain the legacy simple
format and never include `packet_hash` or `worker_id`. The actual `WorkerResultContract` objects built by
`buildWorkerResultContract` (checkpoint.ts) are stored in `current-state.json` under
`completed_children_results` — a field the scorer never reads.

Two secondary bugs were also found during analysis:

* Librarian artifacts (`librarian-*.json`) in the `results/` directory have no `validation` field, causing
  `gateValidationFailed` to emit a false positive on every run that used a closeout-librarian.
* `gateForemanResentPacket` uses `dispatch_epoch > 1` which flags any multi-session run, not actual
  per-child re-dispatch.

Source analysis: `smartdocs/raw/pol-425-legacy-worker-result-artifacts-analysis.md`

## Goal

After implementation:

1. `polaris autoresearch score <run-id>` reads `WorkerResultContract`s from `current-state.json`
   `completed_children_results` when present.
2. Librarian and other non-worker artifacts are excluded from `resultPackets`, eliminating the
   `validation-failed` false positive.
3. `gateForemanResentPacket` no longer falsely flags multi-session runs.

## Scope

* src/autoresearch/score.ts
* src/autoresearch/gates.ts
* src/autoresearch/score.test.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `polaris autoresearch score polaris-run-autoresearch-evidence-loop-2026-06-29-002` no longer reports `validation-failed`
- [ ] `user-intervened` and `foreman-fixed-worker-output` gates evaluate (not skip) when `completed_children_results` is present in state
- [ ] `gateForemanResentPacket` skips or correctly evaluates without false-positive on normal multi-session runs
- [ ] Tests pass

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/autoresearch

## Ordering

Two independent children — either order.

## Non-goals

* Do not modify `src/loop/checkpoint.ts`, `src/types/result-packet.ts`, or any loop source.
* Do not change the `WorkerResultContract` schema.
* Do not add backfill migration for legacy run state files.

POL-425.title: Analyze: Legacy worker result artifacts prevent autoresearch evidence collection

POL-428.title: Fix: Correct gateForemanResentPacket semantics for multi-session runs
POL-428.body:
## Objective

Fix `gateForemanResentPacket` so it detects actual per-child re-dispatch instead of falsely failing
on any run that needed more than one foreman session.

## Context

Current implementation in `src/autoresearch/gates.ts`:

```typescript
export function gateForemanResentPacket(artifacts: RunArtifacts): GateResult {
  const dispatchEpoch = asRecord(asRecord(state)?.["dispatch_boundary"])?.["dispatch_epoch"];
  const failed = dispatchEpoch > 1;
  return { gate: "foreman-resent-packet", outcome: failed ? "failed" : "passed", ... };
}
```

`dispatch_epoch` counts the number of foreman loop sessions (how many times `polaris loop continue`
was called). A normal multi-session run has `dispatch_epoch > 1` — epoch 1 dispatches the first
batch of children, epoch 2 dispatches the next. This is expected behavior, not a bug.

The gate is supposed to detect when the SAME child was dispatched more than once (i.e., the foreman
re-sent a worker packet to the same child after that child already returned a result). This is the
actual problematic behavior the gate should detect.

Confirmed false positive: `polaris-run-autoresearch-evidence-loop-2026-06-29-002` has 3 children
over 2 foreman sessions — correctly designed — but shows `foreman-resent-packet: FAILED`.

## Goal

`gateForemanResentPacket` returns `skipped` when per-child dispatch count data is unavailable, or
correctly detects per-child re-dispatch when the data is available.

## Scope

* src/autoresearch/gates.ts
* src/autoresearch/score.test.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `gateForemanResentPacket` no longer returns `failed` purely because `dispatch_epoch > 1`
- [ ] When `open_children_meta` dispatch records are available, gate checks whether any child has
  a dispatch count > 1 (re-dispatched)
- [ ] When dispatch count data is insufficient to determine re-dispatch, gate returns `skipped`
  with an appropriate detail message
- [ ] Running `polaris autoresearch score polaris-run-autoresearch-evidence-loop-2026-06-29-002`
  no longer reports `foreman-resent-packet: failed`
- [ ] Unit tests cover: single epoch (should pass), multi-epoch with distinct children (should pass
  or skip), per-child re-dispatch detected (should fail)
- [ ] Tests pass

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/autoresearch

## Ordering

Independent — can run concurrently with [POL-427](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-427/fix-load-workerresultcontracts-from-state-and-filter-non-worker-result) (evidence loading fix).

## Non-goals

* Do not modify `dispatch_boundary` schema or `dispatch_epoch` semantics in loop runtime.
* Do not change how `dispatch_epoch` is incremented during dispatch.
* Do not touch `src/loop/` files.

POL-427.title: Fix: Load WorkerResultContracts from state and filter non-worker result artifacts
POL-427.body:
## Objective

Fix the evidence loading path in `score.ts` so `loadRunArtifacts` returns populated
`workerResultContracts` and a clean `resultPackets` list.

## Context

Two bugs in `src/autoresearch/score.ts`:

**Bug A — Wrong evidence source:**
`extractWorkerResultContracts(resultPackets)` looks for `packet_hash` + `worker_id` in cluster
result files. Those files only contain the legacy simple format. The actual `WorkerResultContract`
objects built by `buildWorkerResultContract` (checkpoint.ts) live in `current-state.json` under
`completed_children_results: Record<string, WorkerResultContract>`. The scorer never reads this field.

Result: `workerResultContracts` is always empty. Gates `user-intervened`, `foreman-fixed-worker-output`,
and `worker-output-required-fixing` always skip.

**Bug B — Librarian artifact contamination:**
`readResultPackets` reads ALL `.json` files from `.polaris/clusters/<id>/results/`, including
`librarian-<UUID>.json` artifacts from the closeout-librarian role. The librarian artifact has no
`validation` field. In `gateValidationFailed`, `if (!validation) return true` fires on the librarian
result, causing a false-positive FAILED gate on every run that used a closeout-librarian.

Worker result files follow the pattern `<CHILD-ID>-<UUID>.json` (e.g. `POL-422-87d2b255-….json`).
Non-worker artifacts use `librarian-<UUID>.json`, `CHART-<UUID>.json`, `medic-result-<UUID>.json`.

## Goal

1. `loadRunArtifacts` returns a populated `workerResultContracts` array when `current-state.json`
   contains `completed_children_results`.
2. `readResultPackets` returns only worker result files, excluding librarian/medic/chart artifacts.

## Scope

* src/autoresearch/score.ts
* src/autoresearch/score.test.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `loadRunArtifacts` reads `completed_children_results` from the run's `current-state.json` and
  returns those contracts as `workerResultContracts` when the field is present
- [ ] When `completed_children_results` is absent (truly legacy state), falls back to
  `extractWorkerResultContracts(resultPackets)` for backward compatibility
- [ ] `readResultPackets` excludes files matching `librarian-`, `CHART-`, `medic-result-` filename prefixes
- [ ] Running `polaris autoresearch score polaris-run-autoresearch-evidence-loop-2026-06-29-002` no
  longer reports `validation-failed`
- [ ] Unit tests cover: contract extraction from state, fallback path, librarian exclusion
- [ ] Tests pass

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/autoresearch

## Ordering

Independent — can run concurrently with POL-428 (gateForemanResentPacket fix).

## Non-goals

* Do not modify `src/loop/checkpoint.ts` or `src/types/result-packet.ts`.
* Do not rename or reformat existing `WorkerResultContract` fields.
* Do not backfill `completed_children_results` into legacy state files.
